query:
SELECT pt.contract_external_id, pt.period_no, pt.sub_no,
       CAST(pt.amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) as amount,
       pt.receipt_no,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM debt_collected_cache dcc 
        WHERE dcc.section = 'Fastfone365' 
          AND dcc.contract_external_id = pt.contract_external_id) as cache_rows_for_contract
FROM payment_transactions pt
WHERE pt.section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM debt_collected_cache dcc
    WHERE dcc.section = 'Fastfone365'
      AND dcc.contract_external_id = pt.contract_external_id
      AND dcc.period = pt.period_no
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM debt_collected_cache dcc2
    WHERE dcc2.section = 'Fastfone365'
      AND dcc2.contract_external_id = pt.contract_external_id
  )
ORDER BY pt.contract_external_id, pt.period_no
LIMIT 10;
